{{Quote|Jarg went missing in Sector B, then Reeza saw someone moving south of there. Take a couple troops and find out who it is.|Extract of a Mandalorian datapad|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Jarg''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] who joined the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusaders]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Following the end of the war, he joined [[Sherruk]]'s group of bandits, along with [[Reeza]]. He was a pilot of [[XT-model bike]]. They eventually came to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], where they terrorized and extorted the local populace.

In [[3956 BBY]], Jarg and Reeza were killed by [[Juhani]] in her rage while the rest of the Mandalorians on Dantooine were [[Confrontation on Dantooine|killed]] by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].
